abstraction_plans.license_caution: Do not copy source directly into APEX; derive interfaces and reimplement clean-room after license review.
clean_room_steps: Identify externally visible behavior and architecture patterns from docs/tests.
Write APEX-native interface spec.
Implement minimal Rust/Go/C core plus Python glue if needed.
Add local tests and negative controls.
Run TianGong orchestrator before promotion.
